description: Stay / skip / rides-along decisions for upstream generator/PDK pins that flank the compiler & PD flow. Recorded so the audit answer is durable and so check_*_pin.py keeps fail-closed semantics. NO BUILDS performed by this manifest.

decisions.stay_reason: lowRISC/ibex master HEAD == our pin (9742d89). Zero commits ahead since 2026-04-24 capture. No bump needed; check_ibex_pin will continue to validate HEAD==pin.

tracked_open_prs.title: Zcmp flush on exception
tracked_open_prs.follow_up: re-check after next ibex master tick; only relevant if PMC ends up exercising Zcmp push/pop sequences on the always-on core

decisions.upstream_head_observed: 2026-01-23 per prior audit; tip unchanged at 2026-05-20 audit

rides_along.policy: BOOM is consumed exclusively as a Chipyard submodule. We do not independently bump BOOM; the next Chipyard tip pull-through will advance it. Until then, hold at d2a64f7 to keep Chipyard tree internally consistent.

decisions.follow_up: On next Chipyard SHA bump, re-resolve generators/boom HEAD, update external/boom/pin-manifest.json and check_boom_pin in lockstep, then re-audit the three open PRs above.

decisions.bump_decision: rejected_no_public_rtl_no_license; survey-only QEMU/LLVM model retained for cross-comparison
decisions.selection_status: REJECTED_as_integrated_core_no_published_mobile_license. The integrated big core is the open XiangShan Kunminghu V3 scale-up (generators/chipyard/eliza-kunminghu-big-manifest.json).
decisions.stub_action: Ascalon RTL is commercial-license-only and is NOT selected for integration. Its public QEMU `-cpu tt-ascalon` and LLVM `-mcpu=tt-ascalon-x` models are kept only as upstream cross-comparison references for compiler/SDK tuning; no Eliza core slot is filled by Ascalon.

rides_along.policy: Single chipfoundry/volare release bundles both sky130 + gf180mcu at the same open_pdks SHA. Our existing sky130 bump in external/pdks/pin-manifest.json already covers gf180mcu by transitivity; no separate gf180mcu pin record is required. The standalone google/gf180mcu-pdk repo is dormant and is NOT our live consumption path.

decisions.follow_up: On the next chipfoundry/volare sky130 tag bump, refresh both companion tags (sky130-<SHA> + gf180mcu-<SHA>) atomically; the open_pdks SHA fronts both.

checks_performed: git ls-remote refs/heads/master against pinned SHA for ibex, boom, volare, gf180mcu-pdk
git log inspection of chipyard generators/boom submodule HEAD vs pin
grep verification of TT_ASCALON CPU symbol in external/qemu-src target/riscv/cpu.c (QEMU 10.1.5)
grep verification of TENSTORRENT_ASCALON_X scheduling model in external/llvm-project RISCVProcessors.td
git ls-remote refs/tags for chipfoundry/volare to confirm sky130-<SHA> + gf180mcu-<SHA> companion tag pair
